verbatim_note: All titles/urls verbatim from real WebSearch; snippets empty where none; no fabrication.
bootstrap_applied: >=2 of 5 reformulations per candidate use prior-art-probing phrasing (collision_avoidance cold-start); cross-domain phrasing for 002/003

candidates.niche_name: Learned Token-Choice Routing for Sparse Mixture-of-Attention Heads
candidates.collision_reason: Direct prior art: 'Mixture of Attention Heads: Selecting Attention Heads Per Token' (https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.05144 / https://aclanthology.org/2022.emnlp-main.278/) is exactly a learned token-choice router that selects a subset of k attention-head experts per token, the same core niche as replacing MoSA expert-choice head routing with a learned token-choice router over attention-head experts.

reformulations.query: token-choice routing over attention-head experts sparse mixture of attention

candidates.niche_name: Ultrasensitive Sigmoidal Gating for Specific Mixture-of-Experts Routing
candidates.collision_reason: No direct prior art: sigmoid-gated MoE and switch-like single-expert routing exist (e.g. arxiv 2405.13997, 2602.01466, 2505.10860) but are framed around sample efficiency/convergence; no paper-like source transfers transcription-factor ultrasensitivity / sigmoidal binding cooperativity into MoE router gate-steepness for specificity, so the cross-domain niche is not directly anticipated.

candidates.niche_name: Expert-Choice Routing Models of Ultrasensitive Transcription-Factor Specificity
candidates.collision_reason: No direct prior art: the biology source (interferon-beta enhancer sigmoidal IRF-DNA ultrasensitivity, e.g. Schiffman et al. PNAS 2025 / biorxiv 2025.02.04.636520) uses biophysical Hill-coefficient models, and ML genomics uses attention/transformers for TFBS prediction, but no paper-like source repurposes MoSA-style expert-choice token routing to model promoter-specific ultrasensitive TF activation, so the cross-domain niche is not directly anticipated.

reformulations.query: expert-choice routing model transcription-factor binding specificity ultrasensitive IRF DNA promoter prediction
